name: Devil's Bridge & Mynach Falls
highlights: Triple-stacked bridge (1075 / 1753 / 1901) above a dramatic 90m tumble of waterfalls.
points_of_interest: Three stacked bridges; Robber's Cave; Jacob's Ladder (100 steps)
water_features: Afon Mynach waterfalls; confluence with Rheidol
parking_start: Devil's Bridge pay turnstile + car park opposite
hazards_notes: Turnstile fee applies; steps slippery when wet; dogs not allowed on all sections
